repo_notes.author: Warbird Codex QA
repo_notes.content: Warbird Pro is packet-first for the local dashboard lane. The Vercel dashboard/project is not demoted until the chart packet and local implementation are complete and verified. Codex QA remains the independent verification gate for Devin outputs.

repo_notes.author: Warbird Codex QA
repo_notes.content: For chart parity work, prioritize AGENTS.md, agents/skills/chart-parity-authority/SKILL.md when present, docs/packet_plan_v2.4.1_correction_proposal.md when present, components/charts/LiveMesChart.tsx, indicators/warbird-pro-v9.pine, and approved engine surfaces. Do not treat older packet diffs as current when PR #14 content is available.

repo_notes.author: Warbird Codex QA
repo_notes.content: Nexus local dashboard work uses the approved dropped-in Nexus logic as-is minus TradingView-centric items. Use standard volume for now, and label any missing footprint or trades-side evidence as an adapter gap rather than as equivalent data.

pages.title: Warbird Active Authority
pages.purpose: Document the authority order, current packet-first dashboard lane, and hard stop rules from AGENTS.md.

pages.title: Chart Parity Packet v2.4.1
pages.purpose: Document PR #14 chart-parity-authority skill, corrected proposal, layout rulings, retained chart surfaces, and implementation gates.

pages.title: Local Dashboard Architecture
pages.purpose: Document LiveMesChart.tsx, Lightweight Charts settings, local dashboard runtime, engine surfaces, WebSocket/API paths, and PR #11 keep/fix/discard boundaries.

pages.title: Nexus And Volume Adapter Gaps
pages.purpose: Document Nexus local-dashboard behavior, standard-volume fallback, footprint and Databento trades-side limitations, and confidence-gate rules.

pages.title: Devin Execution Rules
pages.purpose: Document .devin rules, playbooks, no auto-merge/no auto-push policy, main-only protocol, closeout requirements, and Codex QA handoff.

pages.title: Sonic And Review Workflow
pages.purpose: Document SonarQube/Sonic advisory role, Devin Review status, Session Insights retrospective workflow, defect-map workflow, and the self-heal loop for turning repeated review feedback into rules/playbooks/Knowledge.

pages.title: Session Insights Feedback Loop
pages.purpose: Document Warbird category expectations, actionable feedback routing, misleading Knowledge cleanup, repeated issue handling, and L/XL session splitting.

pages.title: Vercel Demotion Gate
pages.purpose: Document proof required before Vercel/Next.js dashboard demotion, rollback expectations, and replacement runtime coverage.
